snippet: This glossary is intended to assist the users of this document in understanding the terms that have been used throughout this document. Bus operator For the purposes of the SDTP, a bus operator is a company or sole trader who is contracted by the Department to operate a school bus service along a specified route. Bus operators must be accredited with Transport Safety Victoria (TSV) and meet safety obligations under the Bus Safety Act 2009 (Vic). Contract vehicle The contract vehicle is the vehicle specified in the contract between the bus operator and the Department for a particular bus route. Dead running The distance that the Department pays the operator for the vehicle to travel between the overnight garage and the first authorised pick-up point each morning, and the reverse in the afternoon. DE or the department The Department of Education.
